fields.description: Automatically move idle (inactive) drivers to the Idle status.
fields.label: Auto-Mark Idle Drivers

fields.description: Minutes of inactivity before an Available driver is marked Idle.
fields.label: Idle Timeout (minutes)

fields.description: Logging in on a new handset deactivates the driver's other devices.
fields.label: Enforce Single Device per Driver

fields.description: When enabled, a CH Transfer Manifest cannot be submitted (Draft → Packed) until at least one carton has been recorded on the Packages tab. Box Count is then auto-derived from the number of packing-slip rows.
fields.label: Require Packing Slip Before Dispatch

fields.description: When enabled, a CH Transfer Manifest cannot be submitted (Draft → Packed) until at least one packing photo has been attached. Complements the packing-slip check with visual evidence — matches SAP EWM Photo Documentation and Oracle SIM Pack Verification.
fields.label: Require Packing Photo Before Dispatch

fields.description: Require a matching manifest/order QR scan before pickup can complete.
fields.label: Enforce Pickup QR Scan

fields.description: Require a matching manifest/order QR scan before delivery can complete.
fields.label: Enforce Delivery QR Scan

fields.description: Require OTP verification before a delivery can complete.
fields.label: Enforce Delivery OTP
Enforce Pickup/Delivery Geofence
fields.description: Block pickup/delivery when the driver's GPS is farther than the radius from the source/destination warehouse.
Average road speed used for predictive stop ETA calculations.
fields.label: ETA Average Speed (km/h)

fields.description: Maximum stops accepted by one route optimization request.
fields.label: Optimizer Maximum Stops

fields.description: Maximum 2-opt improvement passes per route optimization.
fields.label: Optimizer Maximum Passes

fields.description: Maximum requests accepted for one public tracking bearer token in each configured window.
fields.label: Public Tracking Requests Per Window

fields.description: Fixed-window duration for per-token public tracking throttling (10–3600 seconds).
fields.label: Public Tracking Window (seconds)

fields.description: Maximum manifests accepted by one trip creation, attachment, or clubbing request.
fields.label: Maximum Manifests Per Trip

fields.description: Maximum courier-backed manifests processed by one polling request.
fields.label: Courier Poll Batch Size

fields.description: Exact HTTPS hostnames permitted for outbound courier tracking calls, one per line. Empty disables polling.
fields.label: Courier API Allowed Hosts

fields.description: Connect/read timeout for courier API calls (bounded to 15 seconds).
fields.label: Courier API Timeout (seconds)

fields.description: Maximum courier response body accepted (bounded to 1 MiB).
fields.label: Courier API Maximum Response (bytes)

fields.description: Maximum configured courier request URL length (bounded to 8192 characters).
fields.label: Courier API Maximum URL Length

fields.description: Connect/read timeout for the fixed Google geocoding endpoint (bounded to 15 seconds).
fields.label: Geocoding API Timeout (seconds)

fields.description: Maximum Google geocoding response body (bounded to 1 MiB).
fields.label: Geocoding API Maximum Response (bytes)

fields.description: Maximum operational records returned or processed by one logistics API call.
fields.label: Operations Record Row Limit

fields.description: Maximum registered device rows retained or returned for one driver.
fields.label: Driver Device Row Limit

fields.description: Maximum authenticated GPS pings accepted per caller each minute.
fields.label: Driver Location Requests Per Minute

fields.description: Maximum delivery OTP verification attempts accepted per authenticated caller each minute.
fields.label: Delivery OTP Attempts Per Minute

fields.description: Maximum accepted clock skew and replay lifetime for signed courier webhook events.
fields.label: Courier Webhook Replay Window (seconds)

fields.description: Maximum scoped stores processed by one coordinate synchronization request.
fields.label: Geo Sync Store Batch Size

fields.description: Maximum warehouses resolved by one coordinate synchronization request.
fields.label: Geo Sync Warehouse Batch Size

fields.description: Maximum active trips processed by one scheduled ETA SLA pass.
fields.label: ETA SLA Trip Batch Size

fields.description: Fallback dwell time used for route stops without an explicit estimate.
fields.label: ETA Default Dwell (minutes)

fields.description: Maximum trip-history lookback accepted by driver and dispatcher APIs.
fields.label: Driver History Maximum Days

fields.description: Maximum date window accepted by logistics board, lifecycle, and map endpoints.
fields.label: Operations Maximum Window (days)

fields.description: Maximum drivers returned by one scoped dispatcher availability request.
fields.label: Operations Driver Row Limit

fields.description: Maximum UTF-8 payload size accepted by the courier webhook.
fields.label: Courier Webhook Maximum Payload (bytes)

fields.description: Maximum courier webhook requests accepted per source IP each minute.
fields.label: Courier Webhook Requests Per Minute

fields.description: Web Push works on the desk delivery app today; FCM targets the native driver app.
fields.label: Push Provider

fields.description: Upload the Firebase service-account JSON (Admin SDK, HTTP v1). Stored as a private file; never commit it to Git.
fields.label: Firebase Service Account JSON

fields.description: Legacy FCM server key (deprecated by Google in 2024). Retained for reference only; the service-account JSON above is used.
fields.label: FCM Server Key (legacy)

fields.description: Email a daily logistics summary (deliveries, overdue, rejections, fleet status) to managers each morning.
fields.label: Send Daily Logistics Digest

fields.description: One Company|email mapping per line. Unscoped addresses are used only for all-company previews.
fields.label: Extra Digest Recipients
Include Privileged Users in Business Notifications

fields.description: Dispatcher actions are always checked against CH User Scope. Administrator and System Manager bypass; assigned drivers are authorized by Driver ownership.
fields.label: Enforce Store Scope on Dispatcher Actions

fields.description: Role → function mapping for every logistics gate (manifest stage transitions, ops console, overrides, digests). Rows here OVERRIDE the shipped defaults for that function; leave a function unlisted to keep its default. Defaults are seeded on migrate and can be edited or deleted freely.
fields.label: Role Matrix
